titleStmt.title: SII 30.176: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 176. (A.R. No. 254 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the east wall Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 22: 1034 A.D.

summary.p: Begins with the praśasti of the Chōḻa king Rājēndra I, tirumaṉṉivaḷara. It records the gift of 12 kaḻañju of gold by Mādēvi Sāṉi, wife of Tāyapirāṉ Kramavittaṉ, a native of Eṭṭukkūr and also a member in āḷuṅganam of Vāyalūr in Kāyirambēḍunāḍu, in Kāliyūr-kōṭṭam, a subdivision of Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam for burning a perpetual lamp.

The peruṅkuri-mahāśabhā of Parākramasōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a Karaikkōṭṭu Brahmadēyam in Dāmar-nāḍu earmarked the plot of tax free land and agreed to measure out thirty kalam of paddy by way of interest at the temple treasury for the said purpose. The land was also freed from taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunila maṭaṉtaiyum poṟ ceyappāvaiyuñ cīrttaṉic celviyum taṉ perunteviyarākiyiṉ puṟa neṭutiyalūḻiyuḷḷiṭaituṟaināṭun tuṭar vaṉavelip paṭar vaṉa vāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭal Īḻattaraicar tam muṭiyu māṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavar vaiytta cun=tara muṭiyumi n=tiraṉāramu teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatumeṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṉ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāvaṟ palpaḻan=tiviṟ ceruvil ciṉavil Irupattorukālaraicukaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāma
ṉ mevaruñ cān=timaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉaḷapparum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyil Iraṭṭapāṭi yeḻarai yilakkamum navanetik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkara koṭṭamum mutirpaṭavallai matura maṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭavaḷaiya nāmaṇaik koṇaiyum veñcinavirap pañcappaḷḷiyum pācuṭaip paḻanamācuṇitecamu mayarvil vaṇkirtti Ātinakaravaiyil can=tiraṉ tolkulatti n=tirataraṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉakkuvaiyum kiṭṭarum ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurar cernaṟ kocalaināṭum taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai Aḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colai taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇuṟat
tākkita tikkaṉaikkirtti takkaṇalāṭamum kovintacaṉtaṉmāviḻintoṭa vaṅkāra Irāla kaṅkāḷaRead- taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭal kāval kaṭumuraṭ kiṭāramum Alaikaṭal naṭuvil palakalañ celutti caṅkiṟamiRead- caṅkirāmaviṣaiyatuṅka paṉmanākiya vākaiyam porukaṭal kumpa kariyoṭum Akappaṭutturimaiyiṟa piṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamum Ārttavaṉap porttoḻil vācalil vijjātira toraṇamum moytaḷai puṉamaṇi putavamum kaṉamaṇik katavamun niṟainir viṣaiyamum tuṟainirpaṇṇaiyum paṉmalaiyūreyil toṉma
laiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māciriṭiṅkamum kalaṅkā valviṉai Ilaṅkā cokamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māppappāḷamu kāvalupuricai mevapaṅkamumaRead- kāvalam puricai mevilimpaṅkamumvaḷaippantūṟuṭai viḷaippantūṟum kalaitakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamum cikamāval viḷaimātamiliṅkamumRead- titamar valviṉai mātamiliṅkamumkalāmutir kaṭuntiṟal vilāmuritecamum teṇakalār poḻil māṇakkavāramum toṭukaṭal kāval kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟ
koṇṭa kopparakecari paṉmarāna Uṭaiyār śirirājēṉtira coḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2 kāliyūr koṭṭattu kāyirampeṭṭu nāṭṭu vayalūrThis portion which should come after immaṇṭalattu of the sixth line, but inscribed here by mistake and stopped.
Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu tāmarkoṭṭattu tāmar nāṭṭu karaikoṭṭa piramateyamāṉa parākkiramacoḻa caturvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhai peruṅkuṟi perumakkaḷom Ibhūmi nilaivilaiyāvaṇam Ivvūr śrīpontai mahādevarkku Immaṇṭalattu kāliyūrk koṭṭattu kāyirappeṭṭu nāṭṭu vayalūriyāḷuṅkaṇattāruḷ Eṭṭukkūr tāyapirāṉ kramavittaṉ brāhmaṇi mātevicāṉi tirunuṉtā viḷakku Oṉṟukku kuṭuttapoṉ kācu ka
llāl tuḷainiṟai paṉṉiru kaḻaiñcu Ippoṉ paṉṉiru kaḻaiñcum Itevar pakkal koṇṭom koṇṭa paricāvatu Ivvāṇṭu mutal kaḻaiñcu poṉṉukkum yāṇṭu toṟum tevarpaṇṭārattu Aḷakka kaṭavomāṉa nellu muppatiṉ kalam Iṉnellu muppatiṉ kalattukku Āka nāṅkaḷ śāśvatamāka devarkku viṟṟukkuṭukkinṟa bhūmiyākiṉṟatu cuntaracoḻa pereri kiḻ rājamallapperuvatikku meṟku deviyār tumpil nārāca vaākkālukku teṟku kaṇṭatuṭuvu mayiṟ
aṉupavittuppa ki ntu varuvarariṉṟiye Irupatu samasam nāyakam vantamaiyil sabhaiyom kaṭa(va)maikkāka devarkku viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom Iṉnilattuk kiḻpāṟkellai niroṭu vāykkālukku meṟku tenpāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai niroṭuvākkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai peruvāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Innāṟpāṟkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilam Eṇṇūṟṟarupattaiñcu kuḻiyum viṟṟu vilaiyā
yirukālāvatu mukkālāvatu muṟcuṭṭappaṭṭa nāṟpāṟkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa Ittaṉaiyum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom
Innilam muṉpe Iṟaiili Ātalāl Iṟaiyum maṟṟum Eppeṟ(ṟ) paṭṭaṉavum Iṭaiyuṟum varāmai kāttu
kuṭukkakkaṭavomānom mahāsabhaipperuṅkuṟi perumakkaḷom
Digital edition of SII 30.176 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
